mapper.sql: select audit_id, manuscript_id, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, review_round, audit_status, audit_opinion, audit_score, audit_result, invite_time, deadline_time, audit_time, withdraw_time, withdraw_reason, accept_withdraw_time, invite_message, is_deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from editor_audit
mapper.select: where reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} order by invite_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into editor_audit ( manuscript_id, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, review_round, audit_status, audit_opinion, audit_score, audit_result, invite_time, deadline_time, audit_time, withdraw_time, withdraw_reason, accept_withdraw_time, invite_message, is_deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{manuscriptId}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewerName}, #{reviewRound}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditOpinion}, #{auditScore}, #{auditResult}, #{inviteTime}, #{deadlineTime}, #{auditTime}, #{withdrawTime}, #{withdrawReason}, #{acceptWithdrawTime}, #{inviteMessage}, #{isDeleted}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update editor_audit set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where audit_id = #{auditId}
mapper.delete: update editor_audit set is_deleted = '2' where audit_id = #{auditId}

update editor_audit set is_deleted = '2' where audit_id in
#{auditId}
